title: Mastering Incoterms 2020 Rulings
subtitle: A practical Incoterms workshop for teams involved in shipping, procurement, and international trade.
whyThisMatters: Incoterms affect cost, risk, documentation, responsibility, and customer commitments across the shipping process. This course helps commercial and logistics teams use Incoterms 2020 more accurately so handovers are clearer, documents are checked with better context, and avoidable disputes are reduced.
builtFor: Sales or customer service teams involved in international orders
walkAwayWith: Understand what Incoterms do and do not control.
Choose terms with clearer awareness of cost, risk, and responsibility.
Spot common Incoterms mistakes in documents and conversations.
Coordinate more effectively between sales, purchasing, and logistics.

modules.title: Choosing Terms for Real Shipping Scenarios

methodologyCaption: Participants work through practical trade scenarios and document examples to connect Incoterms rules with everyday shipping decisions.
